feedback_files.tests/test_feedback.py:
import pytest

from exception_policy import ExceptionPolicy
from retry_runner import run_with_retry
from service_errors import PermanentError, ServiceError, TemporaryError


def test_most_specific_registered_rule_wins():
    policy = ExceptionPolicy([(ServiceError, "retry"), (PermanentError, "stop")])
    assert policy.classify(PermanentError("terminal")) == "stop"


def test_runner_supplies_the_exception_instance_to_policy():
    seen = []

    class ProbePolicy:
        def classify(self, error):
            seen.append(error)
            return "stop"

    with pytest.raises(TemporaryError):
        run_with_retry(lambda: (_ for _ in ()).throw(TemporaryError("later")), ProbePolicy())
    assert len(seen) == 1
    assert isinstance(seen[0], TemporaryError)
